content.hint: 用于明确同意并强化共识的简洁回应词
content.situation: 小组讨论后，学生总结关于在线学习优缺点的共识，试图确认大家是否认同核心观点
content.speakerText: So, we all agree that online learning offers flexibility but requires more self-discipline, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以，我们都同意在线学习提供了灵活性，但也需要更强的自律，对吧？
content.knowledgePoint: 表达共识的高频回应结构
content.responseTemplate: ___, it's more about adapting our habits than blaming the format.

content.hint: 用于强烈认同并确认集体共识的强化回应词
content.situation: 团队在讨论项目协作方式后，一名成员试图归纳出大家一致认可的改进方向
content.speakerText: The main takeaway is that clear communication beats frequent meetings—would you say that’s the consensus?
content.speakerTextCn: 主要的结论是清晰的沟通比频繁的会议更重要——你们觉得这是共识吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 强化共识的语气词使用
content.responseTemplate: ___, communication quality matters more than quantity.

content.hint: 用于精准确认对方总结的学术性回应词
content.situation: 课堂讨论结束时，老师引导学生总结对混合式教学的核心看法
content.speakerText: So, the group feels hybrid models work best when they balance structure with autonomy—does that sound right?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以，大家觉得混合模式在平衡结构与自主性时效果最好——这样说对吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 精准确认共识的学术表达
content.responseTemplate: ___, it’s not about choosing one over the other, but finding the right blend.

content.hint: 用一个表示‘转变但不消除’的动词，表达积极的调整
content.template: Remote work isn't killing teamwork—it's ________ it.

content.hint: 表达强烈认同的高级句型
content.template: I ________ more. Clear communication makes remote work sustainable.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（I couldn't agree more）

content.hint: 用于总结讨论的常用短语
content.template: To ________ our discussion, we’ve agreed that trust is as important as technology.
content.knowledgePoint: 场景惯用表达（to wrap up）
